segments.text: Make an altar of acacia wood, five cubits long and five cubits wide—the altar shall be square—and its height shall be three cubits.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make its horns on its four corners; its horns shall be of one piece with it. And overlay it with bronze.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make its pans to receive its ashes, and its shovels and its basins and its forks and its firepans; make all its utensils of bronze.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make a grate for it, a network of bronze; and on the network make four bronze rings at its four corners.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Put it under the rim of the altar beneath, that the network may be midway up the altar.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make poles for the altar, poles of acacia wood, and overlay them with bronze.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The poles shall be put in the rings, and the poles shall be on the two sides of the altar to bear it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make it hollow with boards; as it was shown you on the mountain, so shall they make it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Also make the court of the tabernacle. For the south side there shall be hangings for the court made of fine woven linen, one hundred cubits long for one side.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Its twenty pillars and their twenty sockets shall be bronze. The hooks of the pillars and their bands shall be silver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Likewise along the length of the north side there shall be hangings one hundred cubits long, with its twenty pillars and their twenty sockets of bronze, and the hooks of the pillars and their bands of silver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Along the width of the court on the west side shall be hangings of fifty cubits, with their ten pillars and their ten sockets.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The width of the court on the east side shall be fifty cubits.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The hangings on one side of the gate shall be fifteen cubits, with their three pillars and their three sockets.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And on the other side shall be hangings of fifteen cubits, with their three pillars and their three sockets.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the gate of the court there shall be a screen twenty cubits long, woven of blue, purple, and scarlet thread, and fine woven linen, made by a weaver. It shall have four pillars and four sockets.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the pillars around the court shall have bands of silver; their hooks shall be of silver and their sockets of bronze.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The length of the court shall be one hundred cubits, the width fifty throughout, and the height five cubits, made of fine woven linen, and its sockets of bronze.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the utensils of the tabernacle for all its service, all its pegs, and all the pegs of the court, shall be of bronze.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Command the children of Israel that they bring you pure oil of pressed olives for the light, to cause the lamp to burn continually.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: In the tabernacle of meeting, outside the veil which is before the Testimony, Aaron and his sons shall tend it from evening until morning before the Lord. It shall be a statute forever to their generations on behalf of the children of Israel.
segments.speaker: God
